title: Design System: FrontendPilot AI Design System

components.name: Primary Button
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #b2b3ff; color: #0c0d12; padding: 12px 17px; font-weight: 750; border: 1px solid rgba(178,179,255,0.5); border-radius: 11px; font-family: Inter, sans-serif; cursor: pointer; transition: transform 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 12px 32px rgba(139,140,255,0.26); }

narrative.overview: The Command Deck is a dark, precise, and surgical design language. It uses deep contrasts, custom neon overlays, and color-coded signals to present pipeline snapshots cleanly.

rules.name: The Stage Identity Rule
rules.body: Each agent stage must exclusively use its assigned branding accent.

dos: Do wrap code diff modifications in distinct search/replace blocks.
Do show active browser screenshot mockups with scanning sweeps.
donts: Don't use border-left stripe accents greater than 1px.
Don't use rounded radii greater than 24px.
